chapter_title.ar: باب اللِّبَاسِ الَّذِي تُكْرَهُ الصَّلَاةُ فِيهِ وَ مَا لَا تُكْرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 - The clothes in which the Salāt is disliked, and what is not disliked

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/315)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/315)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَا تَقُولُ فِي الْفِرَاءِ أَيُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ يُصَلَّى فِيهِ فَقَالَ أَيُّ الْفِرَاءِ قُلْتُ الْفَنَكَ وَ السِّنْجَابَ وَ السَّمُّورَ قَالَ فَصَلِّ فِي الْفَنَكِ وَ السِّنْجَابِ فَأَمَّا السَّمُّورُ فَلَا تُصَلِّ فِيهِ قُلْتُ فَالثَّعَالِبُ نُصَلِّي فِيهَا قَالَ لَا وَ لَكِنْ تَلْبَسُ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ قُلْتُ أُصَلِّي فِي الثَّوْبِ الَّذِي يَلِيهِ قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad and Muhammad Bin Al Hasan, form Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Abu Ali Bin Rashid who said,

‘I said to Abu Ja’farasws, ‘What are youasws saying regarding the furs? Which thing can one pray Salāt in?’ So heasws said: ‘Which furs?’ I said, ‘The fennec fox, and the squirrel, and the beaver’. Heasws said: ‘You can pray Salāt in the fennec fox and the squirrel, but as for the beaver, so you cannot pray Salāt in it’. I said, ‘But the fox, can we pray Salāt in it’. Heasws said: ‘No, but you can wear it after the Salāt’. I said, ‘Can I pray Salāt in the cloth which is under it?’ Heasws said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 14. Ali ibn Muhammad and Muhammad ibn al-Hassan has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Mahziyar from abu Ali ibn Rashid who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far al-Thaniy, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about furs if performing Salah (prayer) with it is permissible. He (the Imam) asked, ‘Which kind of fur is it?’ I replied, ‘Fennec, squirrel and sable. He (the Imam) said, ‘You can perform Salah (prayer) with fennec and squirrel. Do not perform Salah (prayer) with the fur of sable.’ I then asked about foxes. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, you cannot perform Salah (prayer) with it but you can wear it after Salah (prayer). I then asked, ‘Can I perform Salah (prayer) with the layer of clothes next to it?’ He (the Imam) said, ’No, you cannot do so.’”
